control_mode.validation_profile_comment: strict keeps full guardrails enabled. explore allows more experimentation when explicit control flags are enabled.
control_mode.allow_threshold_decoupling_comment: When true, BL-005 retrieval numeric_thresholds and BL-006 scoring numeric_thresholds may differ. Default false for strict semantic consistency.
control_mode.allow_weight_auto_normalization_comment: When true, scoring component weights are allowed to sum != 1.0 and BL-006 normalizes active weights at runtime.

seed_controls.match_rate_min_threshold_comment: Minimum acceptable match rate (0.0-1.0) for imported tracks against DS-001 corpus. Set to 0.3 (30%) based on empirical data showing 32.2% match rate with current corpus. Known limitation: DS-001 has limited coverage of user's import history - preference profiles built from incomplete data. See Chapter 3 for bias documentation.

fuzzy_matching.enabled_comment: When true, BL-003 adds deterministic fuzzy fallback after spotify_id_exact and metadata_fallback.
fuzzy_matching.combined_threshold_comment: Minimum weighted combined score [0.0, 1.0] for accepting fuzzy candidate.
fuzzy_matching.max_duration_delta_ms_comment: Maximum allowed duration difference for fuzzy matches when both durations are available.
fuzzy_matching.max_artist_candidates_comment: Maximum artist-key candidates considered per unmatched event.

weighting_policy.weighting_policy_comment: Formula knobs for BL-003 preference weight computation. Defaults match the values previously embedded in alignment/weighting.py — change only to tune weight distribution.

top_tracks.min_rank_floor_comment: Minimum weight contribution from rank (prevents zero weight for low-ranked tracks).
top_tracks.scale_multiplier_comment: Multiplier applied to rank-based weight before normalisation.
top_tracks.default_time_range_weight_comment: Fallback time-range weight used when the event's time_range is absent from top_range_weights.

playlist_items.min_position_floor_comment: Minimum weight from playlist position (prevents zero weight for late-position items).
playlist_items.scale_multiplier_comment: Multiplier applied to position-based weight before normalisation.

retrieval_controls.profile_top_tag_limit_comment: Must be <= profile_controls.top_tag_limit. Retrieval cannot request more profile tags than BL-004 produces.

scoring_controls.component_weights_sum_rule_comment: Component weights must sum to 1.0 within +/-0.01 tolerance. BL-006 logs a warning if active weights are rebalanced to normalize to 1.0.

observability_controls.bootstrap_mode_comment: Config-driven observability mode flag recorded in BL-009 metadata.

scenario_policy.scenario_policy_comment: Controls which BL-011 scenarios run. enabled_scenario_ids: list of scenario_id strings, or ["all"] to run every defined scenario. repeat_count: how many times each scenario runs (>=1). comparison_mode: baseline_reference compares each variant against the baseline scenario.

orchestration_controls.orchestration_controls_comment: BL-013 stage graph and execution policy. stage_order: null = use static default order. refresh_seed_policy: auto_if_stale | always | never.
